news.t: Wedbush Launches Another Dan Ives ETF. Why It's Unusual.
2 Best AI ETFs to Buy Now, According to Analysts – 3/20/2026
Wedbush Rings the NYSE Opening Bell in Celebration of the Dan IVES Wedbush AI Revolution ETF (IVES)
The Dan IVES Wedbush AI Revolution ETF Breaks $1 Billion in AUM
Wedbush Fund Advisers' IVES AI Revolution ETF Surpasses $750 Million AUM
Wall Street analyst Dan Ives' AI-ETF off to strong start tech boom

holdings.infoBox: IVES is an equity ETF with a total of 30 individual holdings. The top holdings are Micron Technology stock at 6.50%, Advanced Micro Devices at 5.23%, Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 5.07%, NVIDIA at 4.76%, and Apple at 4.61%.

overview.description: The Dan IVES Wedbush AI Revolution ETF (IVES) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund tracks an index of AI-focused companies selected using proprietary NLP analysis and weighted by float-adjusted market cap, with caps to manage concentration. The fund aims to replicate the performance of leading AI innovators globally IVES was launched on Jun 3, 2025 and is issued by Wedbush.
